# Buildkite Skills for AI Agents
# https://github.com/buildkite/skills

> Buildkite is a CI/CD platform for fast, flexible software delivery.
> These skills teach AI coding agents to configure Buildkite correctly.

## Journey Skills

### buildkite-pipelines
Path: skills/buildkite-pipelines/SKILL.md
Topics: pipeline.yml, step types (command, wait, block, trigger, group, input), plugins, caching, parallelism, dynamic pipelines, matrix builds, artifacts, hooks, retry, concurrency, if_changed, notify

### buildkite-migration
Path: skills/buildkite-migration/SKILL.md
Topics: CI migration planning, bk pipeline convert, converting from GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI, Bitbucket Pipelines, GitLab CI, vendor auto-detection, pipeline best practices for migrated pipelines

## Cross-Cutting Skills

### buildkite-preflight
Path: skills/buildkite-preflight/SKILL.md
Topics: bk preflight, local changes, CI validation, failed jobs, failed tests

### buildkite-agent-runtime
Path: skills/buildkite-agent-runtime/SKILL.md
Topics: buildkite-agent annotate, artifact upload/download, meta-data set/get, pipeline upload, oidc request-token, step, lock, env, secret get, redactor add, tool sign/verify

### buildkite-cli
Path: skills/buildkite-cli/SKILL.md
Topics: bk build create/list/view/watch, bk job log/retry/cancel, bk pipeline, bk pipeline convert, bk secret, bk artifact, bk cluster, bk package, bk auth, bk configure, bk init

### buildkite-api
Path: skills/buildkite-api/SKILL.md
Topics: REST API (api.buildkite.com), GraphQL API (graphql.buildkite.com), webhooks, API authentication, pagination, GraphQL mutations

## Full Documentation
https://buildkite.com/docs/llms.txt
